company_core.products: Noma Security offers an AI security and governance platform designed to provide visibility and control throughout the AI lifecycle, from model development to application runtime. The platform utilizes API-based integrations and real-time threat detection to manage security and compliance risks in AI applications across various environments.

founders.name: Niv Braun
founders.background:
Niv Braun served as a Group Manager at Verint from 2020 to 2022, where he led a 50-person team in developing a new cybersecurity product line. Prior to that, he held various roles at Verint, including Product Team Lead and Outbound Product Manager. His experience also includes serving as a Cyber Security Group Manager in the Israeli Military Intelligence - Unit 8200 from 2015 to 2016.

---
Sources: linkedin.com/in/niv-braun

founders.name: Alon Tron
founders.background:
Alon Tron served as the Data Science Lead at Interai from 2020 to 2022, where he utilized machine learning models and computer vision algorithms to enhance enterprise applications. Prior to that, he held multiple roles at Israeli Military Intelligence, including Development Consultant and Tech Lead in Unit 8200, where he guided development teams in technology upgrades and requirement design. He holds dual Bachelor of Science degrees in Computer Science and Computational Biology from UC San Diego and The Hebrew University of Jerusalem.

---
Sources: linkedin.com/in/alon-tron

The company is also focusing on enabling enterprises to confidently adopt agentic AI, highlighting partnerships with AWS to build a secure foundation for enterprise AI solutions.

agent_output.subject: Noma Security
agent_output.message:
Niv—

I am a former Meta AI researcher who used to work on embeddings and knowledge graphs at Meta and now I invest in data infrastructure and AI at NEA.

I came across Noma and was struck by your API-based approach to AI security across the full lifecycle – from model dev to runtime. The real-time threat detection piece is particularly interesting given how fast agentic systems are moving into production. We're seeing this as the biggest gap in the industry right now.

Curious how you're thinking about the roadmap as enterprises start deploying more autonomous agents – especially around governance at scale.

Want to chat?

Madison

NEA is a 45-yr old VC firm investing $30B from seed to IPO, having led rounds in infra cos like Databricks, MongoDB, Elastic, Cloudflare, Plaid, Sentry, Pulumi, Anyscale, Weaviate, Timescale, and dozens more.
